nasb.text: Lying lips are an abomination to the Lord, But those who deal faithfully are His delight.

esv.text: Lying lips are an abomination to the Lord, but those who act faithfully are his delight.

cnv.text: 撒謊的嘴唇是耶和華憎惡的； 行事誠實是他所喜悅的。

ccb.text: 耶和华厌恶说谎的嘴， 祂喜爱行为诚实的人。

csbs.text: 撒谎的嘴唇，为耶和华所憎恶； 行事诚实的，为他所悦纳。
